title: Hilton Law Firm
description: English-speaking law firm specializing in immigration, divorce, and labor disputes for foreign residents in Tokyo. Over 15 years of experience with expat cases.

title: Foreigners Legal Support Osaka
description: Multilingual legal services in Osaka covering divorce, visa issues, and employment disputes. Consultations available in English, Chinese, and Korean.

title: Tokyo Legal Support Center
description: Free legal consultations for foreign nationals in Tokyo. Covers civil disputes, family law, and labor issues with interpreter support.

title: Shibuya Immigration Lawyers
description: Specialized in visa applications, permanent residency, naturalization, and immigration appeals. All consultations in English.

title: Kansai Labor Law Office
description: Handles unpaid wages, wrongful termination, and workplace harassment cases for foreign workers in the Kansai region.

title: St. Luke's International Hospital
description: Major international hospital in central Tokyo with full English-speaking staff. General medicine, pediatrics, OB/GYN, and emergency services.

title: Tokyo Midtown Medical Center
description: Comprehensive medical center in Roppongi with English-speaking doctors. Internal medicine, dermatology, and health checkups.

title: Osaka Medical Navi (English)
description: Directory of English-friendly clinics and hospitals in Osaka. Covers general practice, mental health, and pediatrics.

title: TELL Lifeline & Counseling
description: English-language mental health support including counseling, therapy, and crisis intervention for expats in Japan.

title: International Pediatrics Clinic Hiroo
description: English-speaking pediatric clinic in Hiroo. Vaccinations, developmental checkups, and sick visits for expat families.

title: RetireJapan Financial Advisory
description: Independent financial advice for foreign residents in Japan. Specializes in NISA, iDeCo, retirement planning, and international investments.

title: Japan FP Consultants
description: Certified financial planners offering English consultations on insurance, investment, tax optimization, and estate planning in Japan.

title: Wise Tax Advisors
description: Bilingual tax accountants handling annual tax returns, international income reporting, and NISA/iDeCo optimization for expats.

title: Osaka International Tax Office
description: English-speaking certified tax accountants in Osaka. Corporate tax, individual returns, inheritance tax, and cross-border taxation.

title: H-Tax Partners
description: Specialized in foreigner tax issues: departure tax, stock options, foreign income reporting, and US-Japan tax treaty optimization.

title: Plaza Homes
description: Japan's largest English-language real estate agency. Renting, buying, and selling properties in Tokyo for foreign residents.

title: GTN Real Estate
description: Specializes in helping foreigners rent apartments in Japan. No guarantor needed. Multilingual support in 12+ languages.

title: Osaka Homes International
description: English-speaking real estate agents helping foreigners find apartments and houses in the Osaka/Kansai area.

title: Nagoya International Clinic
description: English-speaking clinic in Nagoya offering general practice, internal medicine, and travel health services.

title: Fukuoka Foreigner Legal Aid
description: Legal consultation service for foreign residents in Fukuoka. Immigration, labor law, and civil disputes with English interpretation.

title: Ohara & Furukawa
description: Osaka-based firm with deep expertise in international divorce, child custody, and Hague Convention cases. Bilingual staff (English/Japanese). One of the few firms with published Hague Convention expertise. Founded 1979.

title: Setagaya International Law Office
description: English-speaking law firm on US, Canadian, and UK Embassy referral lists. Specializes in international divorce, custody & visitation disputes, and Hague Convention cases. Client testimonials describe successful custody outcomes for foreign fathers.

title: Verybest Law Offices (Divorce)
description: Japan's largest law firm (~400 lawyers, 75 offices nationwide). Handles consensual, mediated, and litigated divorce, child custody, property division, and Hague Convention cases. Free 30-minute initial consultation. English and Chinese support.

title: Masayuki Honda International Law Office
description: Won a landmark shared physical custody ruling in Tokyo Family Court based on foreign law (upheld by Supreme Court, 2021). Fellow of the International Academy of Family Lawyers. Listed on the US Embassy attorney list.

title: Tokyo J Law Office
description: Founded by Eriko Matsuno specifically to serve English speakers. Handles international divorce, custody disputes, Hague Convention child return cases, and ADR/mediation. Arbitrator at Tokyo Bar Association for international family disputes.

title: Tokyo Sanno Law Office
description: Handles international divorce, child custody & visitation, marital property distribution, and Hague Convention cases. Offers teleconference/video consultations. Located in Roppongi, Ark Hills.
